spec_match.rationale: Accurately maps the async-safety race window and explains why the specification retired the implicit queueing mechanism.

interactive.rationale: Playback, previous/next, reset, and slider controls now step through the timing diagram and highlight the race/throw point live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Appropriately matches the core MSE async-deprecation blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: Lacks browser-support indicator or capability checks on load.

references.rationale: The see-also section now links to the correct ChromeStatus feature 5190983595327488.

design_system.rationale: Matches standard CSS and design variables.

summary: A highly descriptive sequence trace that now has real step/playback controls for the timing window and a corrected ChromeStatus reference. It still lacks a live browser-support probe, so edge-case coverage remains partial.
